summary: Admin Wallet Top-up feature with Merchant Selection tested successfully. Backend: 21/21 tests PASSED. Frontend: All UI elements verified working. Fixed bug: Frontend was calling wrong API endpoint for merchants.

bugs_fixed.issue: Frontend was calling /api/partner-portal/admin/partners but correct endpoint is /api/partner-portal/admin/all-partners

backend_tests.search_validation: PASS - Requires query param, returns 422 without
backend_tests.auth_required: PASS - All endpoints require admin authentication

frontend_tests.tab_navigation: PASS - 'Wallet Aufladen' tab visible and clickable
frontend_tests.stats_cards: PASS - Shows Aufladungen heute, Gesamtvolumen, Ausgezahlte Boni, Neue Kunden
frontend_tests.customer_search: PASS - Search input works, finds customers by email/name
frontend_tests.customer_selection: PASS - Shows name, email, current balance (€82.60)
frontend_tests.merchant_list: PASS - Shows approved partners (Wise Test Partner, Test Restaurant)
frontend_tests.bonus_preview: PASS - Shows customer bonus calculations and merchant commission
frontend_tests.topup_button: PASS - 'Guthaben aufladen' button present and functional

backend_apis.POST /api/admin/wallet-topup/topup: Top-up with merchant_id support, 2% customer bonus, €1 first-topup bonus, 2% merchant commission
backend_apis.GET /api/partner-portal/admin/all-partne: Returns list of partners for merchant dropdown

frontend_component.AdminWalletTopup: Fully functional with merchant selection dropdown
frontend_component.merchant_dropdown: Fetches approved partners, shows search, displays commission info

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Frontend API endpoint for fetching merchants was incorrect
Backend properly validates min (€1) and max (€10,000) amounts
Merchant commission calculation is correct: 2% of top-up amount
Bonus preview correctly shows all calculations including merchant commission
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test accounts and approved partners
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Wallet Top-up feature with Merchant Selection fully tested. Fixed bug where frontend was calling wrong API endpoint (/admin/partners instead of /admin/all-partners). All features working: customer search, customer selection with balance display, quick amount buttons, merchant dropdown with search, bonus preview with merchant commission, and top-up button. Test credentials: admin@bidblitz.ae / Admin123!
